title: Hot Dog Maker Fast-food - jeu de cuisine
description: Kids get ready to enjoy the madness of real food in the most amazing street food games. Enter the fast food restaurant kitchen filled with hot sausages for a delicious hot dog. Start your own interesting street food store and get a set of fun cooking games.
